validation.noStories: Add at least one story before starting the pipeline.
validation.emptyTitles_one: {{count}} story title is empty. Fill it in first.
validation.emptyTitles_other: {{count}} story titles are empty. Fill them in first.

empty.title: No saved outputs
empty.description: Run a workflow and save its output to see it here.

director.title: Director orchestration
director.description: AI coordinator evaluates each step and decides the next action

advisor.title: Workflow Advisor
advisor.allGood: Everything looks good — no improvements needed.

relaxed.label: Relaxed
relaxed.description: Almost always continues. Only redirects for critical errors.

lenient.label: Lenient
lenient.description: Accepts most outputs. Redirects only when something important is missing.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Default level. Evaluates quality fairly, suggests improvements when worthwhile.

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Higher standards. Expects thorough work and may redirect for incomplete outputs.

demanding.label: Demanding
demanding.description: Very high bar. Expects comprehensive, production-ready output from every step.

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.help: Additional instructions for the Director when evaluating agent outputs. These are appended to the system prompt.
customInstructions.placeholder: e.g., Always ensure code includes TypeScript types. Prioritize security over performance...

howItWorks.title: How Director Works
howItWorks.evaluates: Evaluates each agent's output after completion
howItWorks.contextualizes: Contextualizes messages so the next agent understands the full picture
howItWorks.redirects: Can redirect (retry) a step if output quality is insufficient
howItWorks.concludes: Can conclude the workflow early if the objective is already met
howItWorks.learns: Learns patterns between runs to improve future evaluations

history.title: Execution History
history.description: All past workflow runs and their execution logs.

condition.title: Condition
condition.subtitle: Route to the first matching branch

hint.withAgent: Matched against {{agent}}’s last line, case-insensitive. The first matching branch runs; the default branch runs if none match.
hint.noAgent: Matched against the previous assistant’s last line, case-insensitive. The first matching branch runs; the default branch runs if none match.

branches.heading: Branches
branches.empty: No branches yet. Add one, then drag a wire from its handle to a downstream assistant.
branches.noDefault: No default branch — if no condition matches, the flow stops on this path.

outputNode.title: Output
outputNode.subtitle: Process & save run output
outputNode.savingHint: Connect agents to this Output node on the canvas to choose which to save.
outputNode.noAgents: No agents connected yet — drag a wire from an agent into this Output node. With no connections it saves nothing.

emailNode.title: Email
emailNode.subtitle: Email run output

enabled.label: Send after each run
enabled.hint: Off by default. When on, this node emails the selected output every time the workflow finishes.

emailNode.sendingHint: Connect agents to this Email node on the canvas to choose which output to send.
emailNode.noAgents: No agents connected yet — drag a wire from an agent into this Email node. With no connections it sends nothing.

structurerNode.title: Structurer
structurerNode.subtitle: Convert agent output into structured data
structurerNode.sourceHint: Driven by the assistants wired into this node on the canvas.
structurerNode.noAgents: No assistants connected yet — drag a wire from an assistant into this node.

mode.label: Extraction mode
mode.parseHint: Deterministically extract JSON or tables already present in the output. No extra cost.
mode.aiHint: Run a Claude pass to extract structured rows from free-form text.

instructions.label: Extraction instructions
instructions.placeholder: Optional guidance for the AI extractor…

schema.heading: Schema
schema.hint: Declare the columns/fields to extract. Leave empty to infer.
schema.empty: No columns — the extractor will infer fields from the content.

dbSaveNode.title: Save to Database
dbSaveNode.subtitle: Persist the structured dataset

datasetLabel.label: Dataset label
datasetLabel.hint: Falls back to the structurer's dataset name when blank.

dbSaveNode.noUpstream: No structurer connected yet — wire a Structurer node into this one.

empty.title: No saved datasets
empty.description: Run a workflow with a Save-to-DB node to store structured data here.

request.label: Request
request.hint: The URL, headers and body accept the {{token}} placeholder — it's replaced with the upstream output.

body.label: Body
body.hint: Sent with POST, PUT and PATCH. Supports the {{token}} placeholder.

timeout.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.hint: The request fails if no response arrives in time.

response.label: Response passed downstream
response.hint: Choose what downstream nodes receive: just the response body, or a JSON envelope with status and headers.

query.label: Search query
query.hint: The query accepts the {{token}} placeholder — it's replaced with the upstream output.

region.label: Region
region.hint: DuckDuckGo region code, e.g. us-en, uk-en, de-de. Leave blank for no region.

output.label: Results passed downstream
output.hint: Choose what downstream nodes receive: a readable list, or a JSON array of records.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.hint: The prompt accepts the {{token}} placeholder — it is replaced with the upstream output.

output.label: Output passed downstream
output.hint: Choose what downstream nodes receive: completion text, or the full JSON response.
